briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting risks in the BaaS ecosystem.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are transitioning to a sovereign payment network, reducing dependence on Visa and Mastercard.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of open banking startup Credit Kudos signals the tech giant's growing ambitions in financial data and credit services.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Koho becomes Canada's latest unicorn following $130-million Series E round](https://betakit.com/koho-becomes-canadas-latest-unicorn-following-130-million-series-e-round/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian neobank Koho has achieved unicorn status after closing a $130-million Series E funding round, marking a major milestone for the Canadian fintech ecosystem.

- **[Nesto secures nearly $1.5-billion valuation in new Series E round](https://betakit.com/nesto-secures-nearly-1-5-billion-valuation-in-new-series-e-round/)** — *BetaKit* — Montreal-based digital mortgage platform Nesto has raised a new Series E round, pushing its valuation to nearly $1.5 billion and cementing its position as a major Canadian fintech player.

- **[Bank of Canada keeps key interest rate at 2.25% as it tries to balance competing economic risks](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/interest-rate-bank-of-canada-june-2026-9.7229759?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — The Bank of Canada held its benchmark rate steady at 2.25%, citing the need to navigate trade uncertainty and domestic economic pressures.

- **[Survey Reveals 85% of Canadians Trust Professional Financial Advice Over Social Media "Finfluencers"](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/survey-reveals-85-of-canadians-trust-professional-financial-advice-over-social-media-finfluencers)** — *Financial Post* — A new survey finds that the vast majority of Canadians still prefer credentialed financial advisors over social media influencers despite the rise of finfluencer culture.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's government flagged screen scraping as a security risk and committed to an open banking framework, a foundational moment for Canada's ongoing consumer-directed finance journey.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Montréal innovation hub Ax.c secures renewed funding and DMZ partnership](https://betakit.com/montreal-innovation-hub-ax-c-secures-renewed-funding-and-dmz-partnership/)** — *BetaKit* — The Montréal-based innovation hub Ax.c has secured renewed funding and a partnership with the DMZ, offering a model for ecosystem-building efforts relevant to Atlantic Canadian tech hubs.

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — This resource cataloguing fintech failures and consumer harms serves as a timely reminder for Atlantic fintech builders and regulators of the importance of trust, transparency, and financial inclusion in product design.
